text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Claims RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 
141 
LINE_NUM_ORIG 
LABEL: 
Original Claim Line Number 
DESCRIPTION: A unique number to identify the transaction line number that is being reported on the original claim. 
SHORT NAME: LINE_NUM_ORIG 
LONG NAME: LINE_NUM_ORIG 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
3 
SOURCE: 
T-MSIS Analytic File (TAF) claims 
FILE(S): 
All line files 
VALUES: 
Valid characters in the text string are limited to alpha
